name: Brute Force
description: Adversaries may use brute force techniques to gain access to accounts when passwords are unknown or when password hashes are obtained.

name: Network Service Discovery
description: Adversaries may attempt to get a listing of services running on remote hosts, including port scans.

name: Exploitation for Privilege Escalation
description: Adversaries may exploit software vulnerabilities in an attempt to elevate privileges.

name: User Execution
description: An adversary may rely upon specific actions by a user to execute malware.

name: Application Layer Protocol
description: Adversaries may communicate using application layer protocols to avoid detection.

name: Network Denial of Service
description: Adversaries may perform DoS attacks to degrade availability of resources.
